params.name: The Three Fates
params.description: The Three Fates, namely Clotho, Lachesis, and Atropos, are the daughters of Zeus and Themis, jointly presiding over the fate of all living beings in the universe. Clotho is responsible for spinning the thread of life, nurturing life; Lachesis measures its length, determining lifespan; Atropos ultimately cuts the thread of life, announcing death. No one can escape their judgment, symbolizing the inevitability of fate. In artistic works, they are often depicted as collaborating to weave the tapest …
